provider: HKU Department of Social Work and Social Administration BSW Student Handbook
note: The official handbook applies to the 2025-26 intake and thereafter and confirms a four-year, 240-credit curriculum. The 150-credit Professional Core comprises 138 credits from the Department of Social Work and Social Administration (126 credits from 18 required courses plus 12 credits selected from the published Macro and Micro disciplinary-elective pools), PSYC1001, and one of SOCI1001, SOCI1003 or SOCI1004. The supplement also records the explicitly coded language and first AI-literacy requirements. The second 3-credit AI-literacy course, 36-credit Common Core requirement, free electives, minors and any future non-credit university requirements remain open pools and are not fabricated as a closed list. Not all disciplinary electives are offered every year.
